targets.query:
from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "du_kpi" and r._field == "cpu_pct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean)
  |> group(columns: ["du_id"])
  |> yield(name: "du_cpu")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "du_kpi" and r._field == "memory_pct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean)
  |> group(columns: ["du_id"])
  |> yield(name: "du_mem")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "du_kpi" and r._field == "fronthaul_latency_us")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean)
  |> group(columns: ["du_id"])
  |> yield(name: "fh_lat")

panels.title: F1 Messages per Second per DU

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "du_kpi" and r._field == "f1_msg_per_sec")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean)
  |> group(columns: ["du_id"])
  |> yield(name: "f1_msg")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "du_kpi" and r._field == "active_ues")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean)
  |> group(columns: ["du_id"])
  |> yield(name: "du_ues")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cu_kpi" and r._field == "pdcp_dl_gbps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "pdcp_dl")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cu_kpi" and r._field == "pdcp_ul_gbps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "pdcp_ul")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "core_kpi" and r._field == "registered_ues")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "core_ues")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "core_kpi" and r._field == "throughput_gbps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: sum)
  |> yield(name: "upf_tput")
